nodes.context: Major drug organization in Detroit, Michigan, among first African American drug cartels to operate on inner-city street corners.
Detroit drug gang that rose to prominence after YBI's downfall.

edges.evidence_quote: Many gangs, such as "Best Friends", "Pony Down", "Black Mafia Family", and "The Chambers Brothers", rose to prominence in the wake of the YBI
edges.context: Best Friends rose to prominence after YBI's downfall, indicating a successor relationship.
